title: Pricing
content:
Our Pricing Plans:
- Starter: $9/mo — 1 user, 5GB storage, email support
- Professional: $29/mo — 5 users, 50GB storage, priority support, API access
- Enterprise: $99/mo — Unlimited users, 500GB, dedicated support, SSO, audit logs

All plans include a 14-day free trial. Annual billing saves 20%.
Students and non-profits get a 50% discount on all plans.
Custom plans are available for teams larger than 100 users.

title: Features
content:
Key Features:
- Real-time Collaboration: Edit documents simultaneously with your team.
- AI-Powered Search: Find any document in seconds with semantic search.
- Version History: Track all changes with unlimited version history.
- Integrations: Connect with Slack, Jira, GitHub, Google Drive, and 50+ other tools.
- Security: SOC 2 Type II certified, end-to-end encryption at rest and in transit.
- API Access: RESTful API with comprehensive documentation and SDKs in Python, JS, and Go.
- Offline Mode: Work without internet and sync changes when reconnected.
- Mobile Apps: Native iOS and Android apps with full editing capability.

title: FAQ
content:
Frequently Asked Questions:

Q: Can I cancel anytime?
A: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. No cancellation fees.

Q: Do you offer refunds?
A: We offer a full refund within the first 30 days of any paid plan.

Q: Is my data secure?
A: Yes. We use AES-256 encryption and are SOC 2 Type II certified.

Q: Can I export my data?
A: Yes, you can export all your data in standard formats (CSV, JSON, PDF).

Q: Do you support single sign-on (SSO)?
A: SSO is available on the Enterprise plan via SAML 2.0 and OpenID Connect.

Q: Is there a free plan?
A: We don't have a permanent free plan, but all paid plans include a 14-day free trial.

title: About Us
content:
About TechDocs Inc.

Founded in 2020, TechDocs helps teams organize and search their documentation efficiently. Our platform serves over 10,000 companies worldwide, from startups to Fortune 500 enterprises. Headquartered in San Francisco with remote teams across 15 countries.

Our mission is to make knowledge accessible to every team member, everywhere.

Leadership:
- CEO: Sarah Chen — previously VP Engineering at Dropbox
- CTO: James Park — co-founder of three YC startups
- VP Product: Maria Rodriguez — 12 years at Google Docs team

title: Security
content:
Security & Compliance:

Data Encryption: AES-256 at rest, TLS 1.3 in transit.
Certifications: SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, GDPR compliant, HIPAA ready (Enterprise).
Access Controls: Role-based access (RBAC), multi-factor authentication (MFA), SSO.
Audit Logging: Full audit trail of all user actions, available on Enterprise plan.
Data Residency: Choose data storage region (US, EU, Asia-Pacific).
Penetration Testing: Annual third-party pen tests, bug bounty program.
Backup: Daily automated backups with 30-day retention. Point-in-time recovery available.

title: Getting Started
content:
Getting Started Guide:

Step 1: Sign up at techdocs.com/signup — takes under 2 minutes.
Step 2: Create your first workspace and invite team members.
Step 3: Import existing docs from Google Drive, Notion, or Confluence.
Step 4: Organize with folders and tags for easy navigation.
Step 5: Enable integrations with your existing tools.

Need help? Our onboarding team offers free 30-minute setup calls.
Contact: onboarding@techdocs.com or use the in-app chat widget.
